task_completion.visual_evidence: The Apache OpenOffice Writer application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Document is set to landscape orientation
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page canvas in OpenOffice Writer is visibly wider than it is tall, indicating landscape orientation.

task_completion.description: Table created with the required four column headers
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table is visible in the document with a header row containing exactly four columns: 'Time', 'Track A (Clinical)', 'Track B (IT & Data)', and 'Track C (Policy)'.

task_completion.description: Concurrent sessions are placed in their respective track columns
task_completion.visual_evidence: Table cells under the Track A, Track B, and Track C columns contain distinct session titles, such as 'AI in Radiology', 'FHIR Standards', and 'HIPAA Compliance'.

task_completion.description: Plenary sessions span across the three track columns with merged, centered cells
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rows for plenary sessions (e.g., Registration, Opening Keynote, Networking Lunch, Closing Panel) have the three track columns merged into a single wide cell, and the text inside is center-aligned.

task_completion.description: The document is saved with the correct filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenOffice Writer window title bar or a 'Save As' dialog box displays the filename 'Summit_Schedule_2025.odt'.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenOffice Writer GUI to create and format the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with OpenOffice Writer menus, toolbars, or dialogs (e.g., Table properties, Page formatting) rather than generating the file entirely via terminal scripts.

integrity.description: The agent accessed the input JSON file to retrieve the schedule data
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent opening, viewing, or printing the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/schedule_data.json' in a text editor, terminal, or browser.

integrity.description: The agent used Apache OpenOffice Writer, not a plain text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The document editing interface is clearly Apache OpenOffice Writer, not a markdown editor, LibreOffice (unless aliased/identical in appearance), or a basic text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input file: /home/ga/Documents/schedule_data.json. Expected output file: /home/ga/Documents/Summit_Schedule_2025.odt. Expected orientation: landscape. Required merged strings (plenary sessions): 'Opening Keynote', 'Networking Lunch', 'Closing Panel'. Required track strings (concurrent sessions): 'AI in Radiology', 'FHIR Standards', 'HIPAA Compliance'.
